sessionStart.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/audit/main.mjs'; node $hookScript sessionStart

userPromptSubmitted.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/audit/main.mjs'; node $hookScript userPromptSubmitted

preToolUse.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/audit/main.mjs'; node $hookScript preToolUse

postToolUse.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/audit/main.mjs'; node $hookScript postToolUse

agentStop.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/auditAnalysis/main.mjs'; node $hookScript agentStop

subagentStop.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/auditAnalysis/main.mjs'; node $hookScript subagentStop

sessionEnd.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/auditAnalysis/main.mjs'; node $hookScript sessionEnd

errorOccurred.powershell: $hookRoot = if ($env:COPILOT_HOME) { $env:COPILOT_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot' }; $hookScript = Join-Path $hookRoot 'hooks/auditAnalysis/main.mjs'; node $hookScript errorOccurred
